creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Hello :-) I have installed BSD on a machine with Creative SoundBlaster Audigy ZS audio card, here I get the very strange sound produced by the card:
1. sound seems to be quantized on random play (even on the same tune).
2. videos seems to hang when sound is freezed or becomes a noise.
3. instead sound I get strange annoying loud noises like chainsaw.

It seems that some parameters are not (re)set correctly on play. Please advise :-)

% dmesg | grep -i audigy
emu10kx0: <Creative Audigy 2 ZS [SB0350]> port 0xdc00-0xdc3f irq 22 at device 7.0 on pci4

 sysctl -a|grep snd
device	snd_cmi
device	snd_csa
device	snd_emu10kx
device	snd_es137x
device	snd_hda
device	snd_ich
device	snd_uaudio
device	snd_via8233
hw.snd.vpc_reset: 0
hw.snd.vpc_0db: 45
hw.snd.vpc_autoreset: 1
hw.snd.latency_profile: 1
hw.snd.latency: 5
hw.snd.report_soft_matrix: 1
hw.snd.report_soft_formats: 1
hw.snd.compat_linux_mmap: 0
hw.snd.feeder_eq_exact_rate: 0
hw.snd.feeder_eq_presets: PEQ:16000,0.2500,62,0.2500:-9,9,1.0:44100,48000,88200,96000,176400,192000
hw.snd.feeder_rate_quality: 1
hw.snd.feeder_rate_round: 25
hw.snd.feeder_rate_max: 2016000
hw.snd.feeder_rate_min: 1
hw.snd.feeder_rate_polyphase_max: 183040
hw.snd.feeder_rate_presets: 100:8:0.85 100:36:0.92 100:164:0.97
hw.snd.vpc_mixer_bypass: 1
hw.snd.verbose: 0
hw.snd.maxautovchans: 16
hw.snd.default_unit: 0
hw.snd.version: 2009061500/amd64
hw.snd.default_auto: 1

% cat /dev/sndstat
FreeBSD Audio Driver (newpcm: 64bit 2009061500/amd64)
Installed devices:
pcm0: <EMU10Kx DSP front PCM interface> (play/rec) default
pcm1: <EMU10Kx DSP rear PCM interface> (play)
pcm2: <EMU10Kx DSP center PCM interface> (play)
pcm3: <EMU10Kx DSP subwoofer PCM interface> (play)
pcm4: <EMU10Kx DSP side PCM interface> (play)

Fix: 

driver? configuration? reset? 64-bit?
How-To-Repeat: Simply play audio and/or audio-video stream on the Audigy ZS card.
